_description: Design tokens for icon-only-button pattern. All values are used in after/styles.css. Contrast ratios are calculated against button backgrounds for non-text content (WCAG 1.4.11).

neutral.usage: Default icon color on neutral button backgrounds (#f3f4f6)
neutral.note: Dark enough to meet 3:1 requirement for non-text content while maintaining subtle appearance.

danger.usage: Delete/remove icon color on danger button backgrounds (#fee2e2)
danger.note: Darker red maintains danger semantic while meeting 3:1 contrast requirement.

fail-example-neutral.usage: Shown in before/ — do not use for icons
fail-example-neutral.note: Common light gray used for 'subtle' icons. Fails 3:1 requirement dramatically.

fail-example-danger.usage: Shown in before/ — do not use for icons
fail-example-danger.note: Mid-range red on light pink background. Fails 3:1 requirement.

danger-background.usage: Danger button background for delete/remove actions

ring.usage: Focus ring outline color — 2px solid, 2px offset. Meets WCAG 2.4.11 (3:1 minimum for focus indicators).

button-size.usage: Width and height of icon-only buttons. Meets WCAG 2.5.5 target size minimum (44x44px) with padding.
